caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, black headphones, and a black sweatshirt with the word "BOSS" in gold lettering sits at a dark table in a studio setting. He is positioned in profile, facing toward the right, speaking into a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. In the background, a white banner features the words "UNION HUSTLE" repeated vertically alongside gold stars. A blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the table, a black mug displays the text "THE TALK OUT" in red and white. In the bottom left corner of the scene, a circular logo contains the words "THE TALK OUT". Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in a seated position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression as he speaks into the microphone, while the background and equipment remain stationary.
